fixes.description: Added BZR1→Storage_reserves (+1) to strengthen BR-to-seed-size coupling
fixes.reason: Failures T059 (det2 KO), T060 (dwf4 KO), T061 (bri1 KO), T101 (Brz) all predicted INCREASED instead of DECREASED in algebraic mode due to RAV1⊣ABI5 detour inverting the BR direction. Adding direct BZR1→Storage_reserves was meant to give BR a positive growth-coupling that overrides the RAV1 detour.
fixes.biological_justification: BR signalling via BES1/BZR1 promotes seed reserve accumulation; BR-deficient and BR-signalling mutants show reduced storage protein deposition (Pankaj et al. 2024 review).

results.reason: REVERTED. Best-method (RWR) accuracy unchanged at 89.4% (gain = 0.0%, below the +0.5% threshold). Investigation revealed iter 1's restoration of Storage_reserves had already given RWR enough signed-graph propagation to correct the BR mutants T059/T060/T061/T101 indirectly via the BZR1⊣RAV1 → LAFL → Storage_reserves path. Adding the direct BZR1→Storage_reserves edge was redundant for RWR. For algebraic mode, the additional edge dropped Storage_reserves from 1.0 to 0.63 in BR-deficient mutants, but the RAV1⊣ABI5 inhibition release still overwhelms the cascade. Reverted per Hard Rule 3.
